zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume de Fiennes II於大約1240年出生在法國時，他的父親Enguerrand de Fiennes49歲，母親Dame Isabelle de Conde - Dame de Conde38歲。他於1267年2月之前與Blanche de Brienne結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1302年登記服兵役。他去世於1302年7月11日在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫可特利可享年63歲，埋葬在比利時福拉安德倫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume de Fiennes II于大约1240年出生在法国时，他的父亲Enguerrand de Fiennes49岁，母亲Dame Isabelle de Conde - Dame de Conde38岁。他于1267年2月之前与Blanche de Brienne结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1302年登记服兵役。他去世于1302年7月11日在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫可特利可享年63岁，埋葬在比利时福拉安德倫。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fiennes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Finnis
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: locative name from Fiennes (Pas-de-Calais).  See also  Filtness  .

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume de Fiennes II was born about 1240, in France, his father, Enguerrand de Fiennes, was 49 and his mother, Dame Isabelle de Conde - Dame de Conde, was 38. He married Blanche de Brienne before February 1267. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He registered for military service in 1302. He died on 11 July 1302, in Kortrijk, West Flanders, Belgium, at the age of 63, and was buried in Flanders, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume de Fiennes II est né environ 1240, à France, son père, Enguerrand de Fiennes, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Dame Isabelle de Conde - Dame de Conde, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Blanche de Brienne avant février 1267. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1302. Il est décédé le 11 juillet 1302, à Kortrijk, Flandre occidentale, Belgique, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Flandre, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume de Fiennes II um 1240 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Enguerrand de Fiennes 49 und seine Mutter Dame Isabelle de Conde - Dame de Conde 38. Er hat vor Februar 1267 Blanche de Brienne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er hat sich 1302 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 11. Juli 1302 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Kortrijk, West-Flandern, Belgien und wurde in Vlaanderen, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Fiennes II è nato il circa 1240 nel Francia, il suo padre, Enguerrand de Fiennes, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Dame Isabelle de Conde - Dame de Conde, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Blanche de Brienne prima del febbraio 1267. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1302. Morì il 11 luglio 1302, nel Kortrijk, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Vlaanderen, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Fiennes IIが約1240年にフランスで生まれた時，父Enguerrand de Fiennesは49歳，母Dame Isabelle de Conde - Dame de Condeは38歳であった。1267年2月以前にBlanche de Brienneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1302年に兵役登録をした。彼は1302年7月11日にベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンコルトリジクで63歳で死去し，ベルギーvラアンデレンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Fiennes II(이)가 대략 1240년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Enguerrand de Fiennes(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Dame Isabelle de Conde - Dame de Conde(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1267년 2월 이전 Blanche de Brienne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1302년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1302년 7월 11일 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 코르트리제이크에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 블라아더에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Fiennes II nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em França, seu pai, Enguerrand de Fiennes, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Dame Isabelle de Conde - Dame de Conde, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Blanche de Brienne antes fevereiro de 1267. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1302. Ele faleceu em 11 de julho de 1302, em Kortrijk, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Vlaanderen, Bélgica.

ru.Couptrain, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Fr: коуптреин, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume de Fiennes II родился около 1240 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Enguerrand de Fiennes было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Dame Isabelle de Conde - Dame de Conde, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Blanche de Brienne перед февраль 1267 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. В 1302 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 11 июля 1302 г. в местности кортриджк, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности влаандирен, Бельгия.

es.Couptrain, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Fr: Couptrain, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume de Fiennes II nació aproximadamente 1240, en Francia, su papá, Enguerrand de Fiennes, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Dame Isabelle de Conde - Dame de Conde, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Blanche de Brienne antes de febrero de 1267. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1302. Murió el 11 de julio de 1302, en Kortrijk, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Vlaanderen, Bélgica.
